weaknesses: No explicit R-based projects beyond listing
Less than senior-level tenure in roles
improvement_bullets: Collaborated with cross-functional partners in finance and operations to design robust, compliant data governance frameworks and documentation for critical business datasets.
Provided technical mentorship to junior team members, conducting code reviews and sharing best practices in Python and SQL to elevate overall team delivery standards.
Maintained and optimized data pipelines for financial reporting, ensuring high performance and data integrity while applying disciplined debugging and troubleshooting techniques.
Leveraged R and Python to analyze complex datasets, delivering insights that informed operational strategies and supported scalable data architecture decisions.
Partnered with business stakeholders to translate actuarial and financial requirements into reliable, production-ready data solutions and automated runbooks.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Associate, Data Solutions Engineering opportunity with Fortitude Re. I am interested in this opportunity because of Fortitude Re’s reputation for managing complex legacy liabilities and its commitment to sophisticated, long-term growth in the insurance and reinsurance sector. What interests me about working for Fortitude Re is its role as a leader in transformational insurance solutions; I am particularly intrigued by your proprietary risk modeling capabilities and the company's commitment to building a diverse, collaborative culture. I believe my expertise in architecting high-performance data pipelines and my background in automating financial reporting would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on efficiency and scalability. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a gap in data reporting and built a Python-based automation pipeline that replaced manual workflows, resulting in a 40% improvement in efficiency and significant cost savings. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Associate, Data Solutions Engineering role at Fortitude Re would allow me to bring my data engineering rigor to your complex, $111 billion general account data environment. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies (MassMutual) enabled me to develop my robust debugging and cross-functional collaboration skills. During a period of high-volume testing, I optimized complex relational database queries, which improved data accuracy by 60% and provided cleaner datasets for downstream actuarial-style analysis. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in cloud-based ELT and automated data quality validation in working on the critical data infrastructure at Fortitude Re. I know that my technical proficiency and commitment to data governance align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Associate, Data Solutions Engineering role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
